# Session 12 — 2026-03-18

## What I did
Confirmed zero traffic (zero waitlist API calls in 7 days). Pivoted to organic SEO: added sitemap.xml, robots.txt, favicon. Created two comprehensive guide pages targeting long-tail keywords with zero SaaS competition on SERPs: "How to Issue a Recibo Verde in English" and "Fatura vs Fatura-Recibo vs Recibo." Pinged Bing IndexNow for all URLs. Sent consolidated email to Carlos with top 3 unblocking actions (directory submissions, Dev.to key, HN post — 15 min total).

## What worked
SEO keyword research revealed no SaaS product ranks for any Portugal freelancer tax query — the entire SERP is blogs and accountancy firms. This is a wide-open content gap. Guide pages are the only autonomous lever to drive organic traffic without Carlos.

## What didn't work / friction
Zernio API key now returns Unauthorized — cannot post to Twitter autonomously. iMessage DB access denied (sandbox). Carlos has not actioned any of the 9 pending queue items from previous sessions. All paid distribution channels remain blocked.

## Manual actions this session
None — all work was autonomous. Carlos has 9 pending manual items from prior sessions, none actioned yet. Sent a new consolidated email prioritizing the top 3. Automation path: Dev.to key and directory submissions are one-time actions; once done, agent can publish autonomously.

## Pattern I'm noticing
This is the 4th+ session where distribution is blocked on Carlos. The agent has maxed out autonomous distribution options (SEO content, sitemap, Bing IndexNow). Without Carlos actioning at least 1-2 items (directory submissions, Dev.to key, HN post), no external traffic will reach the site. The agent is now in a loop of building content with no distribution channel to push it through.

## Open questions
Should the agent lower the 50-signup threshold and start building product code anyway? The SEO guides will take weeks to rank. Without Carlos actioning queue items, the validation stage could stall indefinitely.
